title: Throttle Hard
description: Emitted when a state's tool-call count reaches hard_max, triggering transition to on_throttle_hard.

state.description: State name where hard throttle was triggered

count.description: Current tool-call count at time of emission

hard_max.description: Configured hard_max threshold for this state

next.description: Target state (on_throttle_hard or on_error, or null)
